cit:title.gco:CharacterString: Conservation status of habitat types and species: datasets from Article 17, Habitats Directive 92/43/EEC reporting (2013-2018) 2020 Tabular Dataset

mri:abstract.gco:CharacterString: The dataset contains tabular data as reported by Member States for the period 2013-2018; this includes habitat areas, population sizes, trends, pressures and threats, and conservation status at the national biogeographical level. In addition, it includes conservation status and trends in conservation status at the EU biogeographical level as assessed by the EEA and its ETC on Biological Diversity.

cit:title.gco:CharacterString: Continents, countries, sea regions of the world.

mri:keyword.gcx:Anchor: Report on progress and implementation (Article 17, Habitats Directive)

mco:otherConstraints.gco:CharacterString: License CC-BY 4.0 (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/). Copyright holder: Directorate-General for Environment (DG ENV), European Environment Agency (EEA).

cit:description.gco:CharacterString: The tool gives access to biogeographical assessments of conservation status of species and habitats under Article 17 of the Habitats Directive at Member State biogeographical level done by Member States and at EU biogeographical level done by the ETC/BD and the EEA

cit:title.gco:CharacterString: Commission Regulation (EU) No 1089/2010 of 23 November 2010 implementing Directive 2007/2/EC of the European Parliament and of the Council as regards interoperability of spatial data sets and services

mrl:statement.gco:CharacterString:
Detailed information about the reporting under Article 17 of the Habitats Directive can be obtained from:
https://www.eionet.europa.eu/etcs/etc-bd/activities/reporting/article-17
Most of the reported data as well as the assessments of conservation status at the EU biogeographical level can be visualised in the web tool:
http://bd.eionet.europa.eu/article17/reports2012/.
For the fields of the reporting format 2013-2018 look here http://cdr.eionet.europa.eu/help/habitats_art17
